debug_info.goal:
case h
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ
F : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
ℓ : ℕ → ℝ
hfint : ∀ (n : ℕ), HasIntegral (f n) a b (ℓ n)
hfF : UnifConv f F
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
N n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
M : ℕ
hN : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f n x - F x| < ε / (b - a)
⊢ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε

proof:
simp only [RiemannSum]
  by_cases hM : M = 0
  · simp [hM, hε]
  · rw [← mul_sub, abs_mul]
    have hba : (0 : ℝ) < b - a := by bound
    have hM' : (0 : ℝ) < ↑M := by positivity
    rw [abs_of_nonneg (div_nonneg hba.le hM'.le)]
    rw [← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
    calc (b - a) / ↑M * |∑ i ∈ Finset.range M, (f n (a + (↑i + 1) * (b - a) / ↑M) - F (a + (↑i + 1) * (b - a) / ↑M))|
        ≤ (b - a) / ↑M * ∑ i ∈ Finset.range M, |f n (a + (↑i + 1) * (b - a) / ↑M) - F (a + (↑i + 1) * (b - a) / ↑M)| := by
          apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _)
          exact div_nonneg hba.le hM'.le
      _ < (b - a) / ↑M * ∑ _i ∈ Finset.range M, (ε / (b - a)) := by
          apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left _ (div_pos hba hM')
          apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
          · intro i _; exact le_of_lt (hN _)
          · exact ⟨0, Finset.mem_range.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hM), hN _⟩
      _ = ε := by
          rw [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_range, nsmul_eq_mul]
          field_simp
